title: Foliage tint
description: Tints the rest of the foliage (polytone)
body:
### **_[REQUIRES POLYTONE](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)_**

This pack changes the colors of foliage like saplings and flowers to respect the biome's colors. Mostly flowers and the corresponding saplings

~~If you want the tint to also apply in the inventory check out [this addon for it](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/foliage-item-tint)~~ This broke in 1.21.4.
